name: Citrus Bread w/ Popcorn Flour
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Canola, Sunflower, or Safflower Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the orange and remove all white pith and seeds from the flesh.
2. Puree the pulp and juice in a blender or food processor until almost smooth.
3. Measure 1/2 cup of the pureed pulp and juice and set aside.
4. Discard the remaining pulp.
5. In a large bowl, mix together the dry ingredients: whole wheat flour, popcorn flour, orange zest, lemon zest, and sea salt.
6. Add the measured pureed pulp and juice, water, oil, honey, and yeast to the dry ingredients.
7. Stir until well combined.
8. Pour the batter into a bread pan according to your manufacturer's instructions.
9. Program the machine for WHOLE WHEAT MODE (or use the WHITE BREAD CYCLE in an ABM100-Welbilt).
